title: [CPVP] Red Low Fire
description: A clean, optimized red low fire resource pack designed for CPVP and competitive Minecraft
body:
## Overview
Welcome to **[CPVP] Red Low Fire**, a performance-oriented resource pack specifically tailored for Crystal PvP and competitive Minecraft players. This pack modifies the default fire texture to give you the ultimate advantage during fights.

![Showcase of the fire in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/022ec6d2108c6e5e1888a60a2777b1d0bff4c564.gif)
## Features
* **Red Fire Theme:** Changes the standard orange fire to a sleek, red color that fits competitive PvP setups.
* **Low Fire Overlay:** Lowers the fire animation on your screen when you are burning. This keeps your field of view clear so you never lose track of your opponent.
* **FPS Friendly:** Uses optimized textures to ensure your frame rates stay high during heavy crystal explosions.
